text: Finally something I actually understand. These big companies betting on nuclear makes me want to add some CEG to the college fund.

text: different layers of the same process. ASML does the printing, AMAT does the deposition and etching before and after. both have monopolies in their own lanes.

text: this etf makes sense to me. instead of picking winners just own the stuff that powers ai. bought some for the college fund

text: this is the smartest way to play ai without gambling on individual stocks. the power thesis is rock solid

text: apple admitting they cant build ai chips is wild. but honestly using google and nvidia is the pragmatic move. not checking my position til next year

text: so apple is using google for siri now? thats kind of embarrassing right?? should i be worried about my aapl shares

text: apple has over 2 billion active devices. the partnership is a win for both sides honestly
author: quiet_observer

text: just bought some MU after hearing about their memory chips for AI. feels like im late but everyone keeps saying they make stuff for data centers. hope it works out
author: first_time_caller99

text: MU has quietly been my best position this year. the HBM moat is real and the valuation still looks reasonable even after the run. holding for the long haul.
author: sharp315

text: bought MU at what i thought was the top and it kept going. learning the hard way that i should just buy and shut up lol. not complaining though

text: HBM is the key ingredient in every AI accelerator. MU is the memory king and the cycle is still ramping. youre early if anything.
author: hype_man

text: memory cycle thesis is solid. MU has the best HBM3E in the industry and the forward multiple is still reasonable. could work out.

text: bought GOOGL and it dropped immediately of course. but waymo seems like the real deal and cloud business is growing. just gonna sit on it and stop checking
author: bought_at_the_top

text: alphabet is the most underappreciated mega cap out there. waymo alone could be worth half a trillion in a few years and people act like its nothing. long term hold.

text: waymo is actually impressive. no rug pull risk with google lol. still figuring out if this is like buying eth early but feels safer at least
author: crypto_refugee_88

text: waymo is the real hidden gem in GOOGL. market is pricing alphabet like a dying ad company but cloud and autonomous driving are the growth engines nobody credits them for.
author: hype_man

text: valuation is fair but the ad revenue concern is real. waymo is promising but not profitable yet. worth keeping an eye on.

text: bought SPCX on IPO day like a lemming. down a bit but musk is crazy enough to make this work long term. should i buy more or is that stupid

text: im not checking my SPCX position til next year. space is a long game and musk has a track record of delivering even when he looks crazy. set it and forget it.

text: kicking myself for not buying SPCX on day one. now im waiting for a dip that never comes. should i just buy now or wait for the lockup expiration?

text: lockup expiration could create a real buying opportunity. insiders have a ton of shares they might want to sell. patience pays here.

text: hard to bet against musk when starship is flying and starlink is printing cash. just dollar cost average and ignore the noise.
author: quiet_observer

text: all in on MRVL. if Jensen says its a trillion dollar company then who am i to argue. this is my rent money jk but seriously this could be huge

text: i work in semiconductor design and marvell custom ASIC pipeline is genuinely stacked. hyperscalers are all moving to custom silicon and MRVL has the best position outside of AVGO.
author: work_from_zoom

text: premarket watching MRVL this morning. quiet in here but the custom silicon trade is gonna be massive. night shift crew knows whats up
author: night_shift_trader

text: custom silicon is the next wave of AI infrastructure. hyperscalers want their own chips and MRVL is the best positioned to deliver. massive TAM.
author: hype_man

text: my son told me about IREN and how they went from bitcoin to AI cloud. seems like a smart pivot. bought a small position for his college fund, boring stocks are my thing but this one seems interesting
author: mom_of_3_trading

text: everyone is missing the macro angle on IREN. stranded power assets are becoming incredibly valuable as AI data center buildout accelerates. the bitcoin mining infrastructure pivot to AI is one of the most creative capital allocation stories this year.

text: stop loss?? never heard of her. but seriously IREN has been wild. went from mining bitcoin to signing nvidia deals. this is either genius or stupid and i bought some anyway lol

text: the pivot from bitcoin mining to AI cloud infrastructure is genius. IREN already has the power and the data center expertise. NVDA partnership validates the whole thesis.

text: good timing honestly. cloud margins are expanding fast and the backlog is absurd. waymo is a free option on top

text: solid long term play. googles cash flow generation is underrated and cloud is becoming a real profit center
author: quiet_observer

text: never heard of MDA before. so they build satellite parts and robots for space? seems like a growing market. bought a tiny position to start learning

text: night shift checking in. mda just did a 620M acquisition and has billions in backlog. the space arms dealer nickname is hard to ignore

text: the blue canyon acquisition fills a real gap in their smallsat portfolio. mda is quietly becoming the one stop shop for space hardware and their backlog proves the demand is there
author: turned_into_a_newt

text: theyre canadian so the currency adds some risk. but the backlog is real and space hardware demand isnt slowing down. just watch the cad exposure
author: market_debater

text: the arms dealer of space narrative is real. they build the robotic arms on the ISS and now theyre going after the whole satellite stack. huge TAM
author: hype_man

text: finally something that excites me. ionq is the quantum stock everyone talks about right? at least it cant rug pull like my old crypto bags lol
author: crypto_refugee_88

text: bought IONQ near its high naturally. but quantum is definitely the future right? just gonna hold and pretend my portfolio is fine
author: bought_at_the_top

text: ionqs trapped ion approach is fundamentally different from the superconducting qubit crowd. the error correction advantage is real even if commercial quantum is still early stage
author: sharp315

text: trapped ion is the superior architecture for error correction. ionq is years ahead on that front. quantum is coming faster than most people realize
author: hype_man

text: amazon spending 200 billion is crazy but they always figure it out. aws is a money printer and kuiper sounds like the next big thing. bought a few shares today

text: been holding AMZN for years. capex spooks everyone but AWS custom silicon is the real story here. theyre building their own chip ecosystem and it cuts NVDA out of the loop

text: the market hates the headline number but misses the long game. kuiper constellation is a 100b opportunity and nobody is pricing it in. patient money wins here

text: the capex panic is exactly when you want to buy amazon. been watching this cycle for a decade. every time they spend big people freak out and then the stock doubles
